description_long: This is a modern folding knife with a matte black finish, featuring a single-edged, straight blade with a sharp point. The blade is constructed from metal and has a thumb stud for easy one-handed opening. The handle is ergonomically contoured, made from a durable synthetic or metal material, and is engraved with the brand name 'SOG' in raised letters. The handle also includes textured grip sections and a visible locking mechanism for safety. The overall design is sleek and tactical, suitable for utility or self-defense purposes. No decorative ornamentation is present, emphasizing functionality and durability.
description: A sleek, matte black folding knife with a straight, single-edged blade and a contoured, textured handle engraved with 'SOG'. The design is modern and utilitarian, with a visible locking mechanism and thumb stud.
description_view_0: The knife is viewed edge-on from the tip, showing the thin profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: The knife is seen from the side, displaying the full length of the blade, the 'SOG' branding, and the ergonomic handle.
description_view_2: The knife is viewed edge-on from the handle end, highlighting the thickness and construction of the handle and blade alignment.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the blade and handle, with less visible branding but similar ergonomic features.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, textured, synthetic or metal, engraved with 'SOG'
